days.title: Arrival in Berlin
days.subtitle: Exploring the city's rich history

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel AMANO Grand Central
timeline.detail: Arrive at this centrally located hotel near Hauptbahnhof. Check in, freshen up, and enjoy the hotel's modern amenities.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel AMANO Grand Central, Berlin, Germany

timeline.title: Visit Brandenburg Gate
timeline.detail: Walk to this iconic neoclassical monument symbolizing peace. Capture photos from various angles and learn about its history.

timeline.title: Explore the Reichstag Building
timeline.detail: Tour the German Parliament and enjoy stunning views from the glass dome. Pre-book your visit online for a smooth experience.

timeline.title: Dinner at Zur letzten Instanz
timeline.detail: Experience traditional German fare at Berlin's oldest restaurant. Try the Berlin-style meatballs and beer; it's a local favorite.

timeline.title: Evening Walk at Unter den Linden
timeline.detail: Stroll along this historic boulevard lined with linden trees. Enjoy the nightlife as you take in the vibrant city atmosphere.

localTips: Purchase a Berlin Welcome Card for unlimited public transport and discounts at attractions.
Pre-book Reichstag visits at bundestag.de to avoid long queues.
Try local currywurst from street vendors; it's a must-have Berlin snack.

days.title: Berlin History and Culture
days.subtitle: Diving into the city's heritage

timeline.title: Breakfast at House of Small Wonder
timeline.detail: Enjoy a cozy atmosphere while indulging in a delicious breakfast featuring freshly baked pastries and unique Japanese-inspired dishes.
timeline.mapQuery: House of Small Wonder, Berlin, Germany

timeline.title: Visit Museum Island
timeline.detail: Spend the morning exploring this UNESCO World Heritage site. Visit the Pergamon Museum and the Altes Museum to see ancient artifacts.

timeline.title: Lunch at Ditsch
timeline.detail: Grab a quick lunch of authentic pretzels and snacks at this local favorite while enjoying the lively atmosphere around Museum Island.

timeline.title: Explore the Berlin Wall Memorial
timeline.detail: Visit this important historic site that commemorates the Berlin Wall. Learn about its history through informative displays and exhibits.

timeline.title: Relax at Tiergarten Park
timeline.detail: Unwind in Berlin's largest park. Enjoy a leisurely walk or find a nice spot to relax amidst the natural surroundings.

timeline.title: Dinner at Neni Berlin
timeline.detail: Experience vibrant flavors at this rooftop restaurant. Enjoy panoramic views of the city while savoring Mediterranean-inspired dishes.

localTips: Museum Island tickets can be purchased online for discount bundles.
Visit the Berlin Wall Memorial in the late afternoon for fewer crowds and better photo opportunities.
Don’t forget to try a Berlin-style kebab from a street vendor for late-night snacks.

days.title: Final Day in Berlin
days.subtitle: Culinary experiences and last explorations

timeline.title: Breakfast at Café Einstein
timeline.detail: Enjoy a traditional Viennese-style breakfast with coffee and pastries. This café has a charming ambiance, perfect for the last day.

timeline.title: Visit East Side Gallery
timeline.detail: Stroll along the longest surviving stretch of the Berlin Wall, covered in vibrant murals. Learn about the art's historical significance as you walk.

timeline.title: Lunch at Markthalle Neun
timeline.detail: Experience the renowned food market with various local vendors showcasing homemade food products and delicious street food options.

timeline.title: Shop at Kurfürstendamm
timeline.detail: Spend the afternoon exploring the famous shopping boulevard. Find unique souvenirs and enjoy window-shopping at luxury boutiques.

timeline.title: Coffee at The Barn
timeline.detail: Enjoy specialty coffee at this top-rated café known for its high-quality brews and expert baristas in a minimalist setting.

timeline.title: Departure from Berlin
timeline.detail: Head back to the hotel to collect your bags and take a taxi to the main train station or airport for your departure.
timeline.mapQuery: Hotel AMANO Grand Central, Berlin, Germany

localTips: Markthalle Neun is only open on specific days; check schedules for events.
Using public transport is convenient and efficient; consider getting a day pass.
Plan your purchase journey to ensure you have enough time for last-minute explorations.

budget.note: Unlimited transport and discounts at attractions
Diverse food options at the market

urgent.label: Reserve a table at Neni Berlin
urgent.note: Get a good seat for sunset views
